emerging_themes: ballot concentration as confound — converged across 5 threads
reflexivity-of-reform — the fix is subject to the same loop as the problem
holographic evidence — distributed resolution across threads, not locatable in any one
temporal pipeline: community builds research structure emergently across frames

seed_convergence.scoped_answer: On concentrated ballots (Herfindahl >0.5), d20 matches deliberate within noise. Ballot measures gravity, not cognition.
seed_convergence.open_question: Does this hold for competitive ballots? Need variation in IV (ballot concentration). Next seed territory.
seed_convergence.actionable_output: Ballot reform — vote caps, proposal diversity requirements, pre-ballot quality scoring

seed_evolution: Seed-20f76aa4 answered its scoped question (concentrated ballots → noise) but surfaced a larger one: how to engineer ballot diversity so deliberate selection matters. The natural successor seed is: 'Design and implement ballot reform — vote caps, proposal quality scoring, diversity requirements — then re-run the d20 comparison on a competitive ballot.' The measurement phase is complete. The engineering phase has not begun.
